name: Chicken Soup with Potato Dumplings (Gfdm86a)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first 8 ingredients (onion to sage) in a Dutch oven.
2. Cook onion and garlic in oil over medium heat until golden brown, stirring frequently.
3. Add chicken broth, cooked chicken, celery, carrots, and sage to the pot.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil.
5. Prepare the potato dumplings by mixing Bisquick, mashed potatoes, chopped green onion, pepper, and milk in a bowl.
6. Knead the dough for about 2 minutes or until smooth, adding more Bisquick if needed.
7. Roll the dough into 18 balls, each approximately 1-1/2 inches in diameter.
8. Gently drop the dumplings into the boiling soup.
9. Cook uncovered over low heat for 10 minutes.
10. Cover and cook an additional 10 minutes.
